result.text:
GM, folks! Have a great day ahead!

Judges
Above the bustling streets of Polis, the Judges stand sentinel. Clad in ornate baroque armor, their colossal forms are a reminder of the city's storied past. Yet, their bodies are augmented with cutting-edge technology, their DNA hacked to enhance their abilities. With tech scepters in hand, they enforce the laws of the Templar order, ensuring that tradition is upheld in this retro-futuristic metropolis. As the stars twinkle overhead, they cast a watchful eye over the citizens below, a symbol of the delicate balance between history and progress.

media.ext_alt_text: Derived from smoke, a artwork by the dance of smoke. It captivates the human eye that pierces the veil of reality, challenging the observer to discern the line between the elusive smoke. This artwork represents the fleeting nature of existence, holding a vision that seems as eternal as time itself.
